explanation: This LTL expression ensures that if the system is sharing sensitive information (shareSensitiveInformation), it is only to a user that is cleared (clearance). It guarantees that sensitive information is never shared with unauthorized individuals while maintaining the integrity of the communication process.

This expression captures the requirement that anytime sensitive information is about to be shared (shareSensitiveInformation), it can only happen if the clearance condition is satisfied. If the clearance is not present, the sharing of sensitive information will not occur.

This LTL expression asserts that the robot must always avoid sharing sensitive information unless the user is cleared for such information. This guarantees the protection of critically sensitive information, aligning with the input requirement.
